title: phlox andicola subsp. typica
intro: Phlox andicola subsp. typica, also known as mountain phlox, is a perennial plant native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phlox andicola subsp. typica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
